comment: Hermes brain synthesis from hourly and deep candidate reports. Curated for maintainer review.

candidates.name: trpc-group/trpc-agent-go
candidates.title: trpc-agent-go
candidates.description: A Go framework for building production agent systems with graph workflows, tools, memory, A2A, AG-UI, MCP, evaluation, and observability.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub searches for agent-framework and MCP topics. Stars growing rapidly (1440). Apache-2.0 licensed, actively pushed. Unique Go agent framework with A2A, AG-UI, and MCP support.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: First Go-native production agent framework covering graph workflows, A2A protocol, AG-UI, MCP, evaluation, and OpenTelemetry observability in one package. Fills a gap for Go-speaking agent builders.

candidates.name: redis/agent-memory-server
candidates.title: Redis Agent Memory Server
candidates.description: Fast and flexible memory for agents and AI applications using Redis.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search for agent memory topics. 286 stars, actively maintained. Official Redis Inc. project. License not detected via GitHub API but likely Redis Source Available or MIT.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Official Redis-backed memory layer for AI agents. Addresses a key gap: persistent, fast agent memory that works across sessions and agent instances.

candidates.name: gptme/gptme
candidates.title: gptme
candidates.description: Your agent in your terminal, equipped with local tools: writes code, uses the terminal, browses the web.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search for agent-framework and MCP topics. 4343 stars, MIT licensed, actively maintained. Long-lived terminal agent project with MCP support.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Mature terminal-based AI agent with MCP integration, 4K+ stars, MIT license. Good alternative or complement to Codex/Claude Code for builders wanting local-first agent tooling.

candidates.name: numtide/llm-agents.nix
candidates.title: llm-agents.nix
candidates.description: Nix packages for AI coding agents and development tools. Automatically updated daily.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search for coding-agent topics. 1490 stars, MIT licensed, Nix ecosystem. Daily auto-updated packages for AI agents.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Reproducible, hermetic packaging of AI coding agents via Nix. Useful for teams already in the Nix ecosystem who want reliable, versioned agent deployments.

candidates.name: genomoncology/biomcp
candidates.title: BioMCP
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search for MCP topics. 534 stars, MIT licensed. Domain-specific MCP for biomedical data access.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Domain-specific MCP server for biomedical data. Demonstrates MCP applicability beyond general coding workflows.

candidates.name: tanaikech/ggsrun
candidates.title: ggsrun
candidates.description: High-performance Google Drive CLI and MCP Server for LLM/AI agents. Execute Google Apps Script under a secure sandbox.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search for MCP topic. 167 stars, MIT licensed. Mature project (created 2017) that recently added MCP support. Strong security model with whitelisted runtime sandbox.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Mature Google Drive/Apps Script MCP server with a sandboxed execution model -- rare for MCP servers that handle sensitive Google credentials.
